name: Babu
text: Best gym in town... I was very happy to workout with Flavin Martis the owner... Fully equipped with imported equipments... Highly recommend

name: Movinsha
text: I never expected this gym to be such a good one in the town.. getting a metropolitan vibe.. very good ambience with imported equipments.. highly recommend

name: Lewis Spiers
text: Had a great experience at this gym, very friendly staff, made us feel really welcome. They also have some equipment out on the balcony, so meant we were able to workout in the fresh air without getting too hot!
achievement: Local Guide • 17 reviews • 2 photos • 26 weeks ago

name: Logesh Wini
text: Training at Cult Fitness Hub has been a solid experience, the place is super clean, well-equipped, and has a motivating vibe. Mr.Flavin is friendly and always welcoming, which makes every session better. Perfect mix of great setup + positive atmosphere. Highly recommended!

name: Priyanka Kaushik
text: Such a welcoming space! The energy here keeps me coming back every day. The trainers are very supportive and helpful. The entire team really cares about how you feel and the environment is calm and encouraging. Overall a great place to work out- I highly recommend it to everyone who is looking for a place to get fit.

name: Vidhya Shree
text: I absolutely love training at this gym! The atmosphere is super motivating, and the equipment is up to date. What makes it extra special is the incredible support I get from my personal trainer, Ronaldo. He's beyond dedicated and extremely attentive, always making sure my progress stays on track. If you're serious about fitness and want real results, this is the place to be.

name: Shiva Prema
text: The body achieves what the mind believes and the pain you feel today will be the strength you feel tomorrow, one of the best gym located at Nilgiris coonoor
